globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.analytics.google.com; frame-src https://www.googletagmanager.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
